title: rubus × oxycalyx
intro: Rubus × oxycalyx, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the raspberry species Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to its high concentration of anthocyanins and ellagic acid. The health benefits of Rubus × oxycalyx include reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies.
